scripts.dev:api:clean: sh -c 'port_pids=$(lsof -ti :8787 2>/dev/null || true); watch_pids=$(pgrep -f "node --watch src/main.mjs" 2>/dev/null || true); pids="$(printf "%s\n%s\n" "$port_pids" "$watch_pids" | awk "NF" | sort -u)"; if [ -n "$pids" ]; then echo "[dev:api:clean] killing API watcher/listener pids -> $pids"; for pid in $pids; do kill -9 "$pid" 2>/dev/null || true; done; fi; npm run dev:api'
scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --prefix ../04-prototype run build
scripts.verify:settings:migration: echo "Supabase SQL (run in SQL editor): (1) SELECT key, contract_version FROM settings;  (2) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM settings WHERE data ? 'contractVersion'; -- expected: 0"
